name: meld_na_calculation_workflow
description: Calculate the MELD Na score based on serum sodium, creatinine, bilirubin, and INR values, with sodium level adjustment and score capping.

inputs.input_desc: Patient's serum sodium concentration in mEq/L

steps.step_description: Adjust the patient's sodium level to be within the range [125, 137] mEq/L as per MELD Na calculation rules.

step_inputs.input_desc: Patient's serum sodium concentration in mEq/L

step_outputs.output_desc: Adjusted sodium level for MELD Na calculation

steps.reason: This step involves evaluating whether the sodium level falls below or above specified thresholds and conditionally assigning a clamped value, which fits the condition evaluation template.
steps.detail: If sodium < 125, set adjusted_sodium = 125. If sodium > 137, set adjusted_sodium = 137. Otherwise, adjusted_sodium = sodium.

steps.step_description: Compute the initial MELD(i) score using the formula: 0.957 x ln(Cr) + 0.378 x ln(bilirubin) + 1.120 x ln(INR) + 0.643.

step_outputs.output_desc: Initial MELD score before sodium adjustment

steps.reason: This step involves precise numerical computation using a specific mathematical formula with natural logarithms, which fits the formula calculation template.
steps.detail: MELD(i) = 0.957 x ln(creatinine) + 0.378 x ln(bilirubin) + 1.120 x ln(inr) + 0.643. Use natural logarithm (ln). Round result to 4 decimal places.

steps.step_description: Round MELD(i) to the nearest tenth, multiply by 10, and determine if the result is greater than 11.

step_outputs.output_desc: Boolean indicating if MELD(i) exceeds threshold
Rounded MELD(i) to nearest tenth multiplied by 10

steps.reason: This step evaluates a condition based on a threshold value to produce a boolean outcome and a derived value, matching the condition evaluation pattern.
steps.detail: Round meld_i to 1 decimal place (nearest tenth). Multiply by 10. If the result is > 11, set exceeds_threshold = true; else false.

steps.step_description: Compute the final MELD Na score based on whether MELD(i) exceeds threshold, applying the sodium adjustment formula if needed, and capping at 40.

step_outputs.output_desc: Final MELD Na score capped at 40

steps.reason: This step requires evaluating a conditional formula and applying a capping rule, which involves precise mathematical calculations with variable substitution, fitting the formula calculation template.
steps.detail: If exceeds_threshold is true: MELD = meld_i + 1.32 x (137 - adjusted_sodium) - 0.033 x meld_i x (137 - adjusted_sodium). Else: MELD = meld_i. Then, cap the result: if MELD > 40, set meld_na = 40; else meld_na = MELD. Round final result to 4 decimal places.
